selectors/BaseSelector/get_key.name: get_key
selectors/BaseSelector/get_key.description: Return the key associated with a registered file object. This returns the SelectorKey instance associated to this file object, or raises KeyError if the file object is not registered.

info.excerpt: Return the key associated with a registered file object. This returns the SelectorKey instance associated to this file object, or raises KeyError if the file object is not registered.

selectors/BaseSelector/get_map.name: get_map
selectors/BaseSelector/get_map.description: Return a mapping of file objects to selector keys. This returns a Mapping instance mapping registered file objects to their associated SelectorKey instance.

info.excerpt: Return a mapping of file objects to selector keys. This returns a Mapping instance mapping registered file objects to their associated SelectorKey instance.
